featuredCase.title: Developer adoption friction briefing
featuredCase.sourceEvidence: Quickstart completion is improving but setup remains a drop-off point.
featuredCase.baseline: Next product-quality improvement for pilot expansion: implement and publish a first-class setup recovery path that covers (1) stale CLI detection + upgrade steps, (2) environment variable validation, (3) credential/workspace mismatch detection + reset guidance, and (4) safe re-run behavior after partial setup—so recovery can be demonstrated without support pasting an internal checklist. Treat this as the gating release for adding the two next pilot teams.
featuredCase.candidate: Next product-quality improvement for pilot expansion: implement and publish a first-class setup recovery path that covers (1) stale CLI detection + upgrade steps, (2) environment variable validation, (3) credential/workspace mismatch detection + reset guidance, and (4) safe re-run behavior after partial setup—so recovery can be demonstrated without support pasting an internal checklist. Treat this as the gating release for adding the two next pilot teams.
featuredCase.evaluatorNote: Comparison uses file-backed artifacts for the same eval case so the before/after story is inspectable.

recommendation.label: Legacy heuristic evidence
recommendation.text: OpenAI baseline and OpenAI candidate are live-provider artifacts, but their quality scores come from deterministic heuristics.
recommendation.warning: Re-run both sides with --evaluator=hybrid before using this as live OpenAI quality improvement evidence.
